title: Runtime Mode Start Files Standard / Minimal Prompt Standard
new_or_updated_runtime_rules: Detailed Runtime Mode rules live inside START_HERE_RUNTIME_MODE.md.
START_PROMPT_RUNTIME_MODE.md is minimal and must not duplicate runtime protocol.
All runtime-ready subject packages include reports/CLI_VALIDATION_SUMMARY.md.
ordo lint validates runtime start files standard.
runtime-entry can auto-compile missing or stale IR when CLI is available.
CLI truthfulness missing status is a validation failure.

cli_command_behavior.runtime-entry: auto-compiles missing/stale IR then loads runtime
cli_command_behavior.validate-cli-status: fails when cli_status is missing or false executed_cli_passed has no evidence
cli_command_behavior.go-no-go: writes cli_status and executed_commands for truthfulness validation
cli_command_behavior.repo-check: allows reports/CLI_VALIDATION_SUMMARY.md as source template, still blocks generated reports

new_validation_errors: ORDO-RUNTIME-011 START_HERE_RUNTIME_MODE.md missing required runtime rule
ORDO-RUNTIME-013 minimal prompt does not point to START_HERE_RUNTIME_MODE.md
ORDO-RUNTIME-014 minimal prompt duplicates detailed runtime protocol
ORDO-RUNTIME-016 CLI_VALIDATION_SUMMARY.md missing or lacks CLI status
ORDO-RUNTIME-TRUTH-001 report does not declare CLI status
regression_tests_added: minimal prompt exists and does not duplicate protocol
lint requires runtime start files standard
release report has cli_status and CLI_VALIDATION_SUMMARY.md
init template includes runtime start files
commands_executed: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m unittest discover -s tests -v -> 42/42 OK
known_limitations: Source archives keep compiled IR out of package compiled/ by hygiene policy; runtime-entry can compile it when CLI is available.
